# Session Learnings

## Outcome

Updated the About section to reflect the artist's creative background, early-stage experimentation, and focus on liquid art.

## Key Changes

- Rewrote the About copy in `src/components/HomeInfoSections.jsx`.
- Added a reusable site content brief at `docs/site-content-brief.md`.
- Updated `src/pages/HomePage.test.jsx` to cover the new About wording.

## Learnings

- A reusable content brief makes it easier to keep homepage, about, gallery, and contact copy aligned.
- The About section works best when it balances creative background with the current experimental phase of the work.

## Verification

- `npm test`

## Notes

None
